error[E0499]: cannot borrow `v[_]` as mutable more than once at a time

60 |     let out = run(apfi[sel], &mut v[sel], &mut v[sel + 1]);

   |               |              |
   |               |              first mutable borrow occurs here
   |               first borrow later used by call
   |
